items.title: Agentic Rl From Execution

meta.name: 执行反馈的 agentic RL(领域专家→蒸馏)
meta.problem_solved: coding agent 的多轮工具使用难以用静态监督训练;奖励既稀疏又易被钻空子。
meta.naive_baseline: 纯 SFT 模仿轨迹,或用 LLM 自评当奖励。
meta.how_it_works: 用可验证任务的执行结果当客观奖励;分领域训练专家(Web/UX/单轮QA/软件工程),软件工程专家用多轮 RL + 奖励塑形(未完成轨迹惩罚、轮级工具格式惩罚),最后把各专家蒸馏回单一统一模型。
meta.input: agentic 轨迹 + 可执行环境
meta.output: 单一统一的 coding-agent 模型
meta.tradeoff: 依赖大规模可验证任务与执行基础设施(MegaFlow);训练数据/算力门槛极高且专有。
meta.reusable_pattern: 当能为目标行为构造『可执行的正确性判据』时,用执行反馈代替 LLM 自评做奖励/过滤;分领域专家再蒸馏,兼顾专精与统一。

items.body:
## Mechanism

执行验证(Mini-SWE-Agent 过滤)+ 多轮 RL + 专家蒸馏。可复用点是『执行反馈 > LLM 自评』。出处:arxiv:2603.00729 §4.2。See [[content/qwen3-coder-next]]。
items.excerpt: 执行验证(Mini-SWE-Agent 过滤)+ 多轮 RL + 专家蒸馏。可复用点是『执行反馈 > LLM 自评』。出处:arxiv:2603.00729 §4.2。See [[content/qwen3-coder-next]]。

items.title: Incremental Multiturn Eval

meta.name: 增量多轮记忆评测协议
meta.problem_solved: 一次性长上下文评测无法反映 agent『逐块吸收、读完再问』的真实记忆流程,导致记忆能力被高估或测不准。
meta.naive_baseline: 把全文一次性塞进 context,再问问题(LongBench/∞-Bench 式)。
meta.how_it_works: 把语料切成有序 chunk,逐块喂入并附『请记忆』指令,模型必须自行决定保留什么;读完后再按四维(AR/TTL/LRU/CR)提问。客观题用 SubEM/Recall/F1,开放题用 LLM-judge。
meta.input: 有序 chunks c_1..c_n + 多个 query q_1..q_m
meta.output: 按记忆四维分别给出的分数
meta.tradeoff: 更贴近真实记忆流程,但开放题依赖 LLM-judge,且需要专门构造超长/反事实数据集。
meta.reusable_pattern: 评测一个有状态系统时,按真实使用时序增量喂入、再正交拆解能力维度,而不是一次性给全量输入测单一指标。

items.body:
## Mechanism

增量喂入 + 四维正交拆解,是把『记忆』当有状态过程来测的关键。出处:arxiv:2507.05257v1 §3.4 + §3.1。See [[content/memoryagentbench]]。
items.excerpt: 增量喂入 + 四维正交拆解,是把『记忆』当有状态过程来测的关键。出处:arxiv:2507.05257v1 §3.4 + §3.1。See [[content/memoryagentbench]]。

meta.name: Step-wise GRPO
meta.problem_solved: Memory operations produce sparse, discontinuous rewards across a fragmented multi-stage trajectory, so terminal task reward doesn't cleanly attribute to the memory decisions that caused it.
meta.naive_baseline: Vanilla GRPO assumes a continuous trajectory and scores the rollout as one unit.
meta.how_it_works: Compute the terminal reward R(τ) then broadcast it to all preceding steps so each intermediate step (incl. cross-stage memory actions) receives the same advantage A_t = A_T — long-range credit assignment across stage boundaries.
meta.input: multi-stage trajectory τ = (τ1, τ2, τ3) with terminal reward
meta.output: per-step advantages for heterogeneous memory + reasoning actions
meta.tradeoff: Uniform broadcast is coarse — every step gets identical credit, which can over-reward incidental actions on a successful rollout.
meta.reusable_pattern: When rewards are terminal but decisions are spread across phases, broadcast the terminal advantage to all steps rather than discounting — cheap long-range credit assignment.
